# gsm.qc

Quality Control Tests and documentation for the {gsm} suite of R
packages.

This package creates a qualification report that is triggered by the
release of one of the gsm core packages (`gsm.core`, `gsm.mapping`,
`gsm.kri`, `gsm.reporting`). This qualification report runs a series of
qualification tests, specified in the
`qualification/qualification_specs.csv` table and reports their status.

Additional information about these qualification tests can be found in
the [Qualification Workflow
Vignette](https://gilead-biostats.github.io/gsm.qc/articles/QualificationWorkflow.html).

# 

# Articles

### Quality

- [Qualification
  Workflow](https://gilead-biostats.github.io/gsm.qc/articles/QualificationWorkflow.md):

  Vignette that describes the workflow of the qualification process for
  gsm packages.

- [Qualification Report for the {gsm} R
  Packages](https://gilead-biostats.github.io/gsm.qc/articles/Qualification.md):

  Report generated based on the qualification tests for all gsm packages
